qa_pair.question: Use the omni_health tool to check if the perception server is running. What is the model name returned in the response? Provide just the model name string.
Call the omni_health tool and examine the response. What is the base_url field value? Provide the exact URL string.
List all available tools using the tools/list method. How many tools are registered in total? Provide the number.
Using tools/list, find the tool that handles PDF analysis. What is its exact tool name?
Using tools/list, find the tool dedicated to pure speech-to-text conversion without any reasoning or analysis. What is its exact tool name?

Try calling analyze_image with an invalid file path "/etc/nonexistent_image.xyz" and the prompt "describe this". What error type is returned in the response text? Provide just the error type word that appears after "Error".

Try calling analyze_image with the path "/etc/passwd" and prompt "describe this". This file exists but is outside the allowed media path. What error type is indicated in the response? Provide just the error type word after "Error".

Call analyze_multimodal with only a prompt and no image_path, audio_path, or video_path. The tool should reject this. What word appears in the error message after "Error"? Provide just the first error type word.
Using tools/list, examine the analyze_video tool's input schema. What is the default value for the "with_audio" parameter according to the tool description? Answer true or false.

Using tools/list, examine the analyze_document tool. What are the valid values for the "pages" parameter according to its input schema? Provide the three allowed types separated by commas, in the order they appear.
